title: NEBNext Ultra II Directional RNA Library Prep Kit for Illumina Part 6: End Prep of cDNA
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol performs the end prep for cDNA in the NEBNext Ultra II Directional RNA Library Prep Kit. Reaction buffer and enzyme mix are added to samples before mixing. The sample plate is then moved to an off-deck thermocycler.
steps_raw: This protocol performs the end prep for cDNA in the NEBNext Ultra II Directional RNA Library Prep Kit. Reaction buffer and enzyme mix are added to samples before mixing. The sample plate is then moved to an off-deck thermocycler.
Temperature module cools down to 4 C
10 uL of reaction buffer and enzyme mix is added to each sample
Samples with buffer and enzyme mix added are mixed via pipetting
keywords: NEBNext® Ultra™ II Directional RNA Library Prep
materials_raw: Opentrons 96 Well Aluminum Block with Generic PCR Strip 200 µL
